ham: Hey, just wanted to let you know that the broadband engineer, Mr. Singh, will be visiting your office at 10:30 AM tomorrow to check the connection. Kripya dhyaan dein aur available rahen. Thanks!
spam: Hi! Apko 1 lakh rupees ka personal loan pre-approved hai! 2% interest, 5 saal ke liye. Bas <URL> click karen aur form bharen. Jaldi kare, offer limited. Dhanyawad!
